name: Infor Workforce Management API
what_it_does: Infor Workforce Management REST API for enterprise time and attendance, scheduling, and labor management. Enables AI agents to manage time and attendance tracking for payroll-accurate labor data, handle schedule creation and optimization for shift-based workforce management, access absence and leave management workflow for absence tracking, retrieve labor analytics and productivity reporting for workforce intelligence, manage compliance rule enforcement for multi-jurisdiction labor law management, handle manager exception approval workflow for timecard management, access employee self-service schedule and availability management, retrieve workforce planning and demand forecasting data for staffing optimization, manage union work rule enforcement for labor agreement compliance, and integrate Infor WFM with Infor HCM, CloudSuite, and third-party payroll platforms.
use_cases: Automating schedule optimization from healthcare staffing agents
Managing timecard exceptions from workforce supervisory agents
Enforcing labor law compliance from HR compliance agents
Integrating time data with payroll from payroll processing agents
not_for: Small businesses without enterprise WFM complexity
Salaried-only organizations without shift scheduling requirements
Non-Infor ecosystems without Infor HCM/CloudSuite integration benefit
best_when: An Infor HCM or CloudSuite customer in healthcare, manufacturing, or retail with a large hourly workforce wants AI agents to automate scheduling, time tracking, compliance, and labor analytics.
avoid_when: LABOR LAW RISK: Infor WFM labor law rules automate complex FLSA, state, and CBA compliance — automated rule modification without employment law counsel creates wage and hour litigation risk. Healthcare staffing automation must account for JCAHO nurse staffing ratios; automated nurse scheduling without census validation creates patient safety and regulatory risk. Infor WFM integration with non-Infor HCM requires custom connector development.

auth.notes: Infor WFM uses OAuth 2.0 via Infor OS (Operating Service) identity platform. Developer portal at developer.infor.com. No native webhooks. REST API with JSON/OData. New York, New York HQ (Infor). Koch Industries subsidiary (acquired 2020 for $13B). 50,000+ Infor enterprise customers. Strong in healthcare, manufacturing, and distribution WFM. Competes with UKG, Ceridian Dayforce, and WorkForce Software for enterprise workforce management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription plus implementation
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per employee; professional services
pricing.notes: New York. Infor founded 2002. Koch Industries subsidiary (2020). 50,000+ enterprise customers. Infor WFM strong in healthcare, manufacturing, and distribution. Competes with UKG (Kronos), Ceridian, and WorkForce Software for enterprise WFM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; Infor OS platform dependent

known_agent_gotchas: LABOR LAW RISK: Infor WFM labor law rule automation — FLSA, state overtime, and CBA rules; automated rule modification without employment law counsel creates wage and hour liability
Healthcare staffing ratio risk — JCAHO nurse staffing ratios and state nurse-to-patient ratio laws (California RN ratios) must be validated in automated schedule generation
Infor OS identity dependency — Infor WFM OAuth flows through Infor OS (Infor's unified identity platform); Infor OS configuration issues affect all Infor product API access
No webhooks — Infor WFM lacks native event webhooks; polling required for real-time workforce event monitoring
OData query requirements — Infor WFM REST uses OData protocol; complex filter construction required for workforce data queries beyond simple record retrieval
Koch Industries Infor alignment — Koch-owned Infor focuses on Koch industry verticals; WFM product investment may prioritize industrial and distribution over other verticals
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise WFM. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2/Infor OS. US/EU. Time, scheduling, and labor data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise WFM. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU. Workforce and labor data.
